visual_description: A man in a light-colored suit stands in a dimly lit room, looking surprised. He is flanked by two other men, one in a dark suit and another in a patterned shirt. The man in the light suit raises his hand, holding a small object, as the man in the dark suit turns to look at him.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a calm, conversational tone. The audio is clear and the speech is easily understandable.
